NP ≠ P UNKNOT ∈ NP

The runtime lives in unknot regions. Knots are walls.
Box: Trihexenneon [3,2,3,3] = 54-torus
Boundary: apotheosis wall (knotty)
Interior: smooth unknot
Cert: Reidemeister sequence (Hass-Lagarias-Pippenger 1999)
